calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and issuance of new Birth Certificate hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Petitioner: Yesenia Aguirre, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Female to Male, and grants issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Decree signed in open court.
